description: Minute fragment, from a draft of a bill of divorce of Semah b. […]. The year is only partially preserved: Tishrei […]93. Probably 11th century, so it can be 1032 (if the year is 4793 era of creation) or 1082 if the year is 1393 era of documents. Earlier period is also possible- 932 or 983. AA
description_he: שבר זעיר מטיוטת גט כריתות של צמח בן [  ]. השנה שמורה חלקית: תשרי [  ]93. כנראה המאה ה-11.
